issues.description: TrashFromHand is incorrect. Card text says 'trash 1 of your red Characters' (on board), not from hand. Should be 'KO' with filter for red Characters with 4000+ power.
Filter is empty. Must specify: type includes 'Character', color/attribute is 'Red', power >= 4000.
Action is missing 'optional: true' flag. Card text says 'You may trash', indicating this is optional.
Duration 'EndOfBattle' is correct, but the sequence structure is wrong. The DrawCard and PowerBoost should be conditional on the trash being performed (thenActions of the trash action).
Structure is incorrect. DrawCard and PowerBoost must be chained as thenActions of the optional trash action, not separate actions at root level.
